title: psychotria jasminiflora
intro: Psychotria jasminiflora, also known as the jasmine-flowered psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria jasminiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of Psychotria jasminiflora include tea infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
